critic_notes: Solid section. Six quotes all match the normalized source (after joining 'zeitli­che', 'perso­nelle', 'Ar­beitsklima'-style breaks). Correct answers are well-supported; distractors (Räumliche Ressourcen, Marketingargumente, Abteilungs-Ranking, Betriebsrats-Anforderung) are plausibly wrong. Topic 'methodik' is appropriate — resources for the ISMS are a governance/management topic. Q3 and Q6 are labeled 'experte' which is borderline: both are two-prong lookups rather than real cross-sentence synthesis, but they do require extracting two distinct rationales from adjacent clauses, so it's defensible rather than mislabeled. Page_start = 26 matches section range 26–27. Schema: baustein_id / anforderung_type correctly null.
